channel.title: Anomalies on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Anomalies on Alien Truth Social

item.title: New Lands
item.description:
New Lands is the second nonfiction book by Charles Fort, published in 1923 by Boni & Liveright. The book primarily addresses astronomical anomalies and is described as a satirical critique of astronomers. Fort criticizes astronomical predictions and scientific dogma, expanding on his theories of a “Super-Sargasso Sea” and continents above Earth. Despite its content, New Lands is considered Fort’s worst-regarded book, with its speculations on sky continents and Earth’s shape being seen as dated. The book had poor sales, leading to Boni & Liveright declining to publish Fort’s subsequent work.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Lands
